name: Wetware Ascendant
description: A mid-level fixer stumbles into ownership of a prototype neural implant, and every faction in the megacity will kill, bribe, or betray to claim it.

cards.prompt: A dead courier's satchel spills open in your hands: a prototype neural implant still warm with encrypted firmware. Zenith Corp's logo glints on the case. What now?

leftChoice.text: Pocket it and vanish into the undercity

rightChoice.text: Call your Zenith Corp handler immediately

cards.prompt: Word travels fast in the slums. The Rustfang gang corners you in a noodle alley, demanding the implant so their techs can copy it for the streets.

leftChoice.text: Hand it over for a cut of the copies

rightChoice.text: Bluff that it's already sold and slip away

cards.prompt: Zenith's handler, Ms. Voss, smiles too warmly. 'Return the prototype and we forget your... liabilities. Or keep it and become a liability yourself.'

leftChoice.text: Surrender the implant for corporate protection

rightChoice.text: Negotiate to keep it as 'insurance'

cards.prompt: The Rustfang techs botch the first copy; a kid tester seizes and drops. The gang blames your firmware. Their leader Kell wants answers.

leftChoice.text: Bring in a black-market tech to fix it

rightChoice.text: Deny fault and let them figure it out

cards.prompt: Zenith enforcers sweep the block looking for you, terrorizing residents. Citizens whisper your name as the reason drones circle their homes.

leftChoice.text: Leak the implant's existence to the media

rightChoice.text: Pay off enforcers to look elsewhere

cards.prompt: Loyal to the corp now, you're offered a promotion: hunt down the leaked schematics circulating in the undercity. Old friends are on that list.

leftChoice.text: Take the job and betray the streets

rightChoice.text: Tip off your street contacts secretly

cards.prompt: Holding the implant as leverage, you need it decrypted. A legendary ripperdoc named Solace agrees to meet in a flooded subway station.

leftChoice.text: Let Solace jack into the implant

rightChoice.text: Refuse, fearing a Zenith trap

cards.prompt: The black-market tech, Wire, reveals the implant carries a hidden Zenith backdoor that would enslave any user. Copies would be a leash, not liberation.

leftChoice.text: Strip the backdoor before releasing copies

rightChoice.text: Sell the intact backdoor back to Zenith

cards.prompt: Rustfang gang war erupts as rival crews fight over the incomplete tech. The neighborhood burns. People beg you to end it.

leftChoice.text: Broker a truce using the implant as collateral

rightChoice.text: Sell to the highest-bidding crew and bolt

cards.prompt: The media leak explodes. Citizens rally, but Zenith frames the story as terrorism and you as the terrorist. A journalist offers to tell your side.

leftChoice.text: Go on record with everything you know

rightChoice.text: Stay hidden and let the story fade

cards.prompt: Ms. Voss trusts you now, granting access to Zenith's R&D core. Inside, you find plans to deploy the implant citywide as a compliance tool.

leftChoice.text: Sabotage the deployment servers

rightChoice.text: Report the sabotage attempt to earn Voss's trust

cards.prompt: Your tip saved a dozen street lives, and the undercity now sees you as a folk hero. Kell offers you a permanent seat at the Rustfang table.

leftChoice.text: Accept and organize the gangs against Zenith

rightChoice.text: Decline; stay independent and mobile

cards.prompt: Solace decrypts the implant and something stirs: a fragment of a dead scientist's uploaded mind, pleading to be freed rather than copied or sold.

leftChoice.text: Promise to free the trapped consciousness

rightChoice.text: Ignore the ghost; the tech matters more

cards.prompt: With the backdoor stripped, clean implants flow to the people. Zenith declares open war on the undercity, and both sides look to you to lead.

leftChoice.text: Unite gangs and citizens into a resistance

rightChoice.text: Cut a private deal with Zenith to stand down

cards.prompt: Rich but hunted, you hole up in a luxury capsule. A ghost from your past, a fixer you burned, tracks you down with a gun and a grudge.

leftChoice.text: Buy your way out with cred

rightChoice.text: Offer them the implant to disappear

cards.prompt: The city teeters on revolt. Every faction demands you pick a side once and for all before the whole megacity ignites.

leftChoice.text: Stand with the people in the streets

rightChoice.text: Stand with the corp behind the walls

cards.prompt: Ms. Voss reveals her endgame: she wants you as her personal fixer, running Zenith's shadow operations across the megacity. The implant sealed your fate.

leftChoice.text: Accept the crown of corporate power

rightChoice.text: Turn on Voss with everything you've learned

cards.prompt: Wire and Solace propose the impossible: broadcast the freed consciousness across the whole net, gifting the implant's power to every citizen at once.

leftChoice.text: Trigger the citywide broadcast

rightChoice.text: Hold back; the risk is too great

cards.prompt: The megacity holds its breath. Whatever alliances you forged now converge on a single rooftop showdown where the implant's fate is decided for good.

leftChoice.text: Destroy the implant so no faction can rule it

rightChoice.text: Keep it and become the new power broker

cards.prompt: Dawn breaks over the megacity, its skyline forever altered by your choices. Corp boardrooms, gang dens, citizen crowds, and hidden tech-shrines all whisper your legend now.

leftChoice.text: Fade into myth, a fixer who reshaped the city

rightChoice.text: Step into the light to rule what you built
